name: find-files
description: Find files matching name/path patterns with automatic exclusion of node_modules, git, cache, husky, dist, and optional sorting, counting, content filtering via --grep, path filtering via --path-grep, and head/tail limiting.

parameters.name: --name
parameters.description: File name glob pattern (comma-separated for multiple)

parameters.name: --path
parameters.description: Positive path glob filter like find -path (comma-separated for multiple)

parameters.name: --type
parameters.description: f for file, d for directory

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Case-insensitive content pattern to search file contents (replaces find | xargs grep -l)

parameters.name: --path-grep
parameters.description: Case-insensitive regex pattern to filter file paths (replaces find | grep -i pipe)

parameters.name: --count
parameters.description: Show only total count of matches

parameters.name: --tail
parameters.description: Show last N results instead of first N

parameters.name: --offset
parameters.description: Skip N results from start, combine with --head for pagination (replaces find | head -N | tail -M)

parameters.name: --exclude-name
parameters.description: Exclude files by name glob pattern (comma-separated for multiple)

examples.expected: Up to 10 .tsx/.ts files containing Navigate or redirect

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses find with inclusions, exclusions, grep -v, xargs grep -l, sort, wc, and head/tail into one step, saving N-1 agent steps per search.
